title: Perform LEI Search on GLEIF Website
summary: This skill describes how to perform an LEI search on the GLEIF website to find a company's LEI number for KYC analysis.

root_steps.title: Open browser and navigate to GLEIF website
root_steps.description: Open a browser and navigate to search.gleif.org.

root_steps.title: Type company name into search bar
root_steps.description: In the "Search LEI Records" section, type the company name (e.g., "nvidia") into the search bar.

root_steps.title: Select relevant company from options
root_steps.description: From the list of options, select the company that is related to your search (e.g., NVIDIA Corporation).

root_steps.title: Locate LEI code
root_steps.description: The website will load information related to the company; locate the LEI code, which is at the very top.
